---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability the plugin should grow.
title: "Feature: <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What user-visible problem does this solve? Avoid prescribing a solution
in this section.

## Proposed approach

A sketch of how the plugin could address it. Keep it shape-level — the
slice issue and PR can lock the details.

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve this? What's the tradeoff?

## Upstream Musubi requirements

Does this need anything from the Musubi core that doesn't exist yet? List
the API surface or behavior required so we can coordinate the upstream
slice.

## Out of scope

What this issue is **not** asking for. Useful for keeping discussion focused.
